title: Update game theme to traffic road setting with traffic obstacles

requirements.text: Replace the current game background with a scrolling traffic road scene that maintains the infinite scrolling behavior of the existing Background component

quotes: Background: Replacing the current scene with a traffic road background

acceptanceCriteria: Background displays a traffic road texture with lane markings
Road scrolls continuously from right to left matching game speed
Seamless infinite scrolling is maintained without visible seams

requirements.text: Replace existing obstacle types (rocks and puddles) with traffic-themed obstacles including cars and traffic cones in the Obstacle component

quotes: Obstacles: Updating to traffic-themed obstacles like cars and traffic cones (replacing rocks and puddles)

acceptanceCriteria: Obstacle component supports 'car' and 'trafficCone' types instead of 'rock' and 'puddle'
Cars and traffic cones have appropriate sizes and textures
Collision detection works correctly with new obstacle types
Game over is triggered when Shinchan collides with traffic obstacles

requirements.text: Update the Game component's obstacle spawning logic to spawn traffic-themed obstacles (cars and traffic cones) instead of rocks and puddles

quotes: Obstacles: Updating to traffic-themed obstacles like cars and traffic cones (replacing rocks and puddles)

acceptanceCriteria: Spawning logic randomly generates cars and traffic cones
Spawn rates and positions are appropriate for traffic road gameplay
Difficulty progression continues to work with new obstacle types

constraints: Maintain all existing gameplay mechanics including endless runner, chocobi chip collection, progressive difficulty, dual controls, and score tracking
Keep the Shinchan anime aesthetic while adapting to traffic road theme
Do not modify backend logic or schema
Preserve the existing collision detection system in frontend/src/utils/collision.ts
nonGoals: Changing the core gameplay mechanics or controls
Adding new game features beyond the traffic road theme
Modifying the score system or difficulty progression formulas

required: Traffic road background with lane markings for infinite scrolling (traffic-road-bg.dim_1920x600.png)
Car obstacle sprite in side view for traffic road gameplay (car-obstacle.dim_128x64.png)
Traffic cone obstacle sprite for road hazards (traffic-cone.dim_64x64.png)
